name: Paffendorf
description: '''Paffendorf''' is a German [[electronic dance music]] project. The group consists of [[Ramon Zenker]], also [[record producer|producer]] of [[Fragma]], Gottfried Engels and Nicolas Valli. The project is represented by the Cologne [[Disc jockey|DJ]] Christian Schmitz, active on Tiger Records. Paffendorf is best known for their 2000 [[hit record|hit]], "Where Are You", although they have had various successful hits across [[Europe]], their best known in the [[UK]] being "Be Cool," which peaked at number 7 in the [[UK Singles Chart]] in June 2002. Their song, "Under My Skin", had become an Internet meme, featuring Momo, a character from the anime series ''[[Sumomomo Momomo]]'' repetitively imitating a train engine with her hands and jumping up and down. The song had been sped up to sound similar and rival to a more popular Internet meme, [[Caramelldansen]].
